title: CDD refresh guidance update
summary: Updated customer due diligence evidence expectations and review notes for analyst execution.
fullGuidance: This guidance change updates customer due diligence evidence expectations and analyst review notes. Analysts should confirm required evidence is present, document any missing information, and apply the refreshed review standard for newly worked cases.

title: Escalation wording clarification
summary: Clarified escalation language for cases requiring additional quality or leadership review.
fullGuidance: This update clarifies escalation wording for cases requiring additional quality or leadership review. Analysts should use the revised language when documenting why a case was escalated and what decision or support is required.

title: Transaction monitoring disposition notes
summary: Added examples for concise, complete, and auditable disposition narratives.
fullGuidance: This guidance adds examples for concise, complete, and auditable transaction monitoring disposition narratives. Analysts should describe the alert driver, relevant review steps, conclusion, and rationale in a consistent format.
